description:
Increments take Variable (Variable Pseudo-generic) as a global, and will increase the value that Variable (Variable Pseudo-generic) points to by 1.

If you need to add more than + 1 to your value, use the Add node instead.|suggestion}}

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Call this to write the value.
fields.OnWritten: sends an impulse after * (Call) has been impulsed and the value pointed to by Variable (Variable Pseudo-generic) has been incremented.
fields.OnFail: sends an impulse after * (Call) has been impulsed and the value wasn't able to be incremented due to a missing target or Variable (Variable Pseudo-generic) not pointing to a valid IField`1.
